summary: Read-only comparison of plan items P1-07 Review Queue Burn-Down Automation and P1-08 Semantic Job Settlement Rail against current DinoBrain repo and data-root state files. Found current state reports fresh and fully classified, with remaining gaps: P1-07 open review count is 73 not below 50; P1-08 state lacks required rule_id, required_provider, stale_since, source_status, last_error, and transition_reason fields on all semantic jobs, and current implementation/test surface is narrower than the full plan acceptance.
decisions: Used existing state files under <machine-local-path> as primary evidence; did not edit files.
Treated current user instruction as higher priority than DinoBrain memory.
Classified outcome as partial because implemented settlement exists and state is fresh/classified, but both P1-07 and P1-08 have plan-level gaps.
next_steps: Burn down or manually review 24+ of the 73 remaining open review items to satisfy the plan target of open queue below 50, while preserving classification/evidence metadata.

Extend semantic job settlement schema/report to include rule_id, required_provider, stale_since, source_status, last_error, transition_reason, retry/stale policy classes, and final-readiness blockers matching P1-08.
Add or align semantic job retry/stale/final-readiness verification with the plan-named acceptance tests.
